notes: Updates can now be fully automatic on every install — not just source-tree ones. Pick Automatic in Settings → Updates: instant (OTA) updates apply themselves when the app launches, and when a new native version ships, Android downloads the APK and hands it to the system installer by itself (you just tap Install — Android requires that), while desktop installer builds download and run the setup on their own. Notify me keeps the old behavior: an Update button and nothing moves without you.
